config.user_description: Write the /triage-feedback project skill, similar to tasks/advanced/Skill für Übungsaufgabe 2.md. Big change: the result is ALWAYS a new ticket (see docs/specs/SPEC-API-TICKETS.md) in status Definition, assigned to AI. In step 3a the skill adds a comment to the ticket requesting the missing info. In step 3b the ticket is not changed. The skill does NOT push to remote and does NOT create a PR. Read the env vars from backend/.env and set them before the skill uses the app APIs.
config.special_instructions: No push to remote, no PR. Result always a new ticket (Definition/AI). Step 3a: comment on ticket requesting missing info. Step 3b: ticket unchanged. Read backend/.env env vars before using app APIs.
